title: 索引管理工具 + 索引管线修复
description: 新增 CLI 索引管理脚本（reindex/delete/list/stats），修复 reindex API 未派发 Celery 任务、delete_repo_index branch 过滤 bug、Celery worker 缺 psycopg2 三个阻塞性问题。直接需求：type-fest 仓库因 TS type_alias_declaration chunker 修复需要重新索引。

changes.title: CLI Index Management Tool
changes.description: scripts/manage_index.py — async CLI with reindex/reindex-all/delete/list/stats subcommands. Reuses existing IndexWriter, ContentExtractor, Chunker, DocChunker, RuleExtractor, EmbeddingEncoder.

changes.title: Fix delete_repo_index branch filter on doc/rule indices
changes.description: doc_chunks and rule_chunks ES documents have no 'branch' field, but delete_repo_index filters on repo_id+branch for all indices — doc/rule data never gets deleted. Fix: use repo_id-only filter for doc/rule indices.

changes.title: Fix reindex API endpoint not dispatching Celery task
changes.description: POST /repos/{id}/reindex creates IndexJob record but never calls reindex_repo_task.delay(). Add Celery dispatch after DB commit.

changes.title: Add psycopg2-binary for Celery worker sync DB access
changes.description: Celery worker's _get_sync_session() needs psycopg2 (sync PG driver), only asyncpg is installed. Add psycopg2-binary to dev dependencies.
